module.title: RAMS Mission Control
module.subtitle: Reliability analytics workstation
module.selectEquipmentPrompt: Please select an equipment from the sidebar to begin analysis.

health.isoTitle: Average completeness of failure records (equipment, interval, mode, corrective closure)

dashboard.title: Operations dashboard
dashboard.noSnapshot: No KPI snapshot for this filter. Run an analysis from Asset foundation or refresh snapshots.
dashboard.weibullHint: Curve R(t) = exp(−(t/η)^β) from the latest stored Weibull fit.
dashboard.weibullEmpty: Run a Weibull fit to plot the curve.
dashboard.markovHint: Steady-state mass on discrete states (last evaluated model).
dashboard.markovEmpty: Evaluate a Markov model in Advanced methods to see states here.
dashboard.rulHint: Median remaining life from the Weibull fit and recorded exposure hours (maintenance history and operating profile).
dashboard.rulEmpty: No RUL estimate. Run a Weibull fit and ensure exposure or meter data exists.

lab.title: FTA / RBD visual lab
lab.equipHint: Active asset is selected in the RAMS sidebar
lab.needModel: Create or select a model first.

and.title: AND gate
and.desc: Output fault occurs only if all input faults occur (logical intersection).

or.title: OR gate
or.desc: Output fault occurs if any input fault occurs (logical union).

be.title: Basic event
be.desc: Primary initiating event or component failure with probability P (and derived λ, U over reference interval τ).

block.title: Reliability block
block.desc: Element with reliability R; unavailability U and failure rate λ are shown for the reference interval τ.

series.title: Series structure
series.desc: All subsystems must work; combined reliability is the product of component reliabilities.

parallel.title: Parallel structure
parallel.desc: Redundant paths; system works if at least one path works (1−Π(1−Ri)).

advanced.title: Advanced methods
advanced.heatmapTitle: FMECA severity × occurrence matrix (failure mode counts)
advanced.heatmapHint: Counts are aggregated from all FMECA analyses for the selected asset. Click a cell to filter the table to that (S, O) pair.
advanced.filterHint: Click a cell to filter rows
advanced.noRows: No FMECA rows for this filter. Create analyses and items in Asset foundation, or adjust the equipment id.
advanced.invNoWo: No linked work order for spare check

governance.title: Governance
governance.body: Ishikawa (fishbone) RCA diagrams are persisted per asset. Add causes under each 6M branch, save, and compare multiple assets when needed.
governance.promoteBody: Creates a traceable link to this Ishikawa diagram. Save the diagram first if you have not already.
governance.promoteNeedSave: Save the diagram before promoting a cause.
governance.promoteNeedUser: You must be signed in to create a work order.
governance.promoteNeedFmecaAnalysis: Create an FMECA analysis for this equipment first.
governance.promoteSuccessWo: Work order created from RCA cause.
governance.promoteSuccessFmeca: FMECA row created from RCA cause.

foundation.title: Asset foundation
foundation.hint: Taxonomy, exposure, KPI jobs, and data quality drill-throughs.
